keyPoints: Anchor the chapter on a verify-outputs checklist as the core guardrail: citations, confidence estimates, and truth checks, integrated with retrieval grounding.
Quantify throughput impacts across task complexity using staged verification and selective gating to preserve user experience.
Outline a concrete experimental design with baseline, citations-only, confidence, truth checks, and retrieval-gating conditions.
Articulate failure modes (hallucinations, over-trust, mode collapse) and concrete countermeasures (deliberate difficulty, diverse outputs, reflective prompts).
Deliver actionable heuristics for designers and practical use-protocols for knowledge workers to sustain taste, judgment, and long-term discipline.
Emphasize provenance, calibration (ECE), and robust evaluation benchmarks (TruthfulQA, HallucinationEval) as evaluation anchors.
Incorporate governance and transparency cues, including abstention and human-in-the-loop for high-stakes outputs.
